name: Frat Makes You Their Piggy
description:
You go to a frat party only to be mocked and humiliated in a hazing ritual for being chubby. Stripped, they make you wear a pig snout, ears and make you oink, snort and crawl. Then they all take turns fucking you.

Ok ill admit this is a fucking weird one. Fetishes are weird stuff, I'm sorry...

TW: noncon, severe humiliation, severe fatphobia, severe meanness...
creator: Survusmammam
